summary: Chegg laid off 441 employees (20% of workforce) after ChatGPT's launch significantly reduced demand for its homework help and tutoring services. CEO Dan Rosensweig directly attributed the revenue decline to students shifting to free AI tools.
ceo_quote: Since March we saw a significant spike in student interest in ChatGPT. We believe it's having an impact on our new customer growth rate.

secondary_sources.title: Chegg stock drops 48% after ChatGPT threat

evidence.description: CEO directly cited ChatGPT as cause of customer loss and subsequent layoffs.
Q1 2024 earnings showed 7% YoY revenue decline attributed to AI competition.
